tasks.label: Select nRF Connect SDK
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west4nrfsdk.yml && west config manifest.path c2usb

tasks.label: Select McuXpresso SDK
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west4mcuxsdk.yml && west config manifest.path c2usb

tasks.label: Select SDK by vscode workspace
tasks.command: west config manifest.file west4${config:c2usb.startupSdk}.yml && west config manifest.path c2usb
